records.name: NRI

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation:
*2021 (post-COVID DX demand surge — Q1 compounder peak):* stock ¥3,110 (May 13) – ¥5,170 (Dec 16) per Nikkei 10-year history; year-end close ¥4,935 (+33.6% YoY). FY3/2021 actual (period ending Mar 2021, reported May 2021): revenue ¥550,277M, operating profit ¥80,675M, net profit ¥52,892M per Tempest cache (有価証券報告書, IFRS basis). Stock-move catalyst: post-COVID enterprise DX acceleration drove SI demand; NRI's Financial IT Solutions segment (largest by revenue) leveraged Nomura Group's digital infrastructure spend; broad TOPIX rerating of cash-rich large-cap IT names. Sign summary: revenue rose; operating profit rose; net profit rose; shares rallied to all-time high ¥5,170 (Dec 16) on enterprise DX tailwind + broad large-cap-IT rerating. 業績 ◎ (revenue + profit growth) / 株価 ◎ (year-close +33.6%, ATH).

<<CANONICAL FY2021>>

records.name: NRI

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation:
*2022 (the large-cap-SI derating year — under_priced_de_rated_grower at scale):* stock ¥2,992 (Nov 30) – ¥5,030 (Jan 4) per Nikkei; year-end close ¥3,115 (−36.9% YoY). Jan 4 ¥5,030 was a hangover from the December 2021 peak; the year then de-rated steadily through Nov 30 ¥2,992 trough. **FY3/2022 actual: revenue ¥611,634M, operating profit ¥106,218M (record), net profit ¥71,445M (record)** per irbank.net source-verified figures (matched Tempest cache within rounding). **Accounting-basis caveat: the reported FY3/2022 vs FY3/2021 YoY growth rates (+11.1% rev / +31.5% OP / +35.1% NP) span an accounting-standard change — FY3/2021 short-form report was 日本基準 (Japanese GAAP); the recent annual disclosures use IFRS. The reported headline YoY rate is NOT a clean like-for-like operational growth rate. The verified LEVELS — ¥106.2B OP and ¥71.4B NP, both records — are the load-bearing facts.** The 2022 Q2 ◎/✕ designation rests on the profit-level (record) + stock-derating (−37% close), not on the growth rate's interpretation. Sign summary: revenue, operating profit, net profit all reported above prior year (basis-change-spanning); record OP and record NP at the level; shares fell sharply to ¥2,992 multi-year low (Nov 30) on broad large-cap-IT multiple compression; **strong business level + cheap stock = the same Q2 ◎/✕ shape as MF/PAC/Rakus/Appier 2024**, valid at quadrant level regardless of growth-rate interpretation. 業績 ◎ (record OP + record NP at the level, basis-change-spanning) / 株価 ✕ (close −36.9% YoY, multi-year low). Stock-move catalyst for the −37% close: 2022 broad Japanese growth-stock derating + global higher-rates regime + multiple compression on large-cap-IT cohort (same pattern that hit PLAID 2022, Money Forward 2022, SHIFT 2022 at smaller caps). NRI's PER had reached ~30× at the 2021 ATH; the derating compressed the multiple sharply despite operational acceleration. Sign summary: revenue rose +11.1% YoY; operating profit rose +31.6% YoY; net profit rose +35.0% YoY; shares fell sharply to ¥2,992 multi-year low (Nov 30) on broad large-cap-IT multiple compression; business strong, stock derated. **The widening gap between record operational profit growth and the −37% stock close = under_priced_de_rated_grower** (same shape as MF/PAC/Rakus/Appier 2024 at smaller cap). 業績 ◎ (strong rev + OP + NP growth) / 株価 ✕ (close −36.9% YoY, multi-year low).

<<CANONICAL FY2022>>
業績_sign: ◎
株価_sign: ✕

op_dir: up
net_dir: up

records.rawExplanation:
*2023 (recovery — TSE governance reform tailwind + continued operational growth):* stock ¥2,908 (Mar 16) – ¥4,363 (Sep 15); year-end close ¥4,101 (+31.7% YoY). **FY3/2023 actual: revenue ¥692,150M (+13.2% YoY), operating profit ¥111,790M (+5.3% YoY), net profit ¥76,304M (+6.9% YoY)** per Tempest cache. Stock-move catalyst: 2023 TSE capital-efficiency / P/B-above-1 reform push lifted the cohort of large-cap cash-rich Japanese names including NRI; continued operational growth (rev double-digit, OP/NP mid-single-digit) preserved the compounder thesis; multiple recovery from the 2022 trough. Sign summary: revenue rose +13.2% YoY; operating profit rose +5.3% YoY; net profit rose +6.9% YoY; shares rallied to ¥4,363 (Sep 15) on TSE PBR-above-1 reform tailwind + continued compounder execution; business strong, stock recovering. 業績 ◎ (rev + OP + NP all positive but OP/NP growth moderated) / 株価 ◎ (year-close +31.7% recovery).

<<CANONICAL FY2023>>

*2024 (steady-compounder year — modest stock + moderating growth):* stock ¥3,789 (May 1) – ¥5,495 (Sep 27); year-end close ¥4,659 (+13.6% YoY). **FY3/2024 actual: revenue ¥736,600M (+6.4% YoY), operating profit ¥120,399M (+7.7% YoY), net profit ¥79,594M (+4.3% YoY)** per Tempest cache. Stock-move catalyst: continued compounder execution; OP/NP growth moderating but firmly positive; Sep 27 high coincided with mid-cycle TOPIX strength. Sign summary: revenue rose +6.4% YoY; operating profit rose +7.7% YoY; net profit rose +4.3% YoY; shares rallied to ¥5,495 high (Sep 27); business steady, stock steady (+13.6% close). 業績 ◎ (all positive but growth moderating) / 株価 ◎ (close +13.6%, no new ATH but strong year).

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (acceleration to new ATH — OP +12%, NP +17.7%, mid-term plan announcement):* stock ¥4,444 (Jan 14) – ¥6,476 (Nov 25); year-end close ¥6,021 (+29.2% YoY, new ATH territory above the 2021 peak ¥5,170 — first time since the 2022 derating). **FY3/2025 actual (announced April 24, 2025): revenue ¥764,813M (+3.8% YoY), operating profit ¥134,907M (+12.0% YoY), operating margin 17.6%, net profit ¥93,800M (+17.7% YoY)** per 決算短信 IFRS / xtech.nikkei.com coverage. Annual dividend ¥77 (vs FY3/2024 ¥74, +¥3). **NRI announced new mid-term plan (V2030) at the April 24, 2025 results: targets revenue ¥1T+ and OP margin 20%+ by FY3/2030, implying ~5.4% rev CAGR and ~9% OP CAGR.** Stock-move catalyst: FY3/2025 operational acceleration (OP/NP growth re-accelerated after FY24's moderation) + new mid-term plan establishing 10-year ¥1T trajectory + V2030 vision; broke through 2021 ATH territory. Sign summary: revenue rose +3.8% YoY; operating profit rose +12.0% YoY; net profit rose +17.7% YoY; operating margin 17.6%; annual dividend lifted ¥3 to ¥77; shares rallied to new ATH ¥6,476 (Nov 25) on FY25 acceleration + V2030 plan; business strong, stock strong. 業績 ◎ (OP/NP growth re-accelerating; FY3/2025 short of mid-term plan rev target ¥810B but strong on OP) / 株価 ◎ (close +29.2%, new ATH).

<<CANONICAL FY2025>>
業績_sign: ◎
株価_sign: ◎

Cautious side: FY3/2025 revenue ¥764.8B was short of mid-term plan target ¥810B (−5.6%); FY3/2026 Q4 (Jan–Mar 2026, announced April 2026 — AFTER the 2025 window) subsequently reported a ¥67.9B net loss and FY3/2026 NP guidance −83.7% YoY per recent kabuyoho coverage — suggests forward growth thesis may be re-pricing in early 2026, though OUTSIDE the 2021–2025 fixture window. Concentration on Nomura Group revenue remains a structural feature. Global expansion (FY3/2022 ¥123.2B → FY3/2025 target ¥150B) is M&A-driven; integration risk on overseas acquisitions.

Sources:
- Tempest local cache: data/tempest/4307/{company.json, snapshot.json, financials.json, segments.json} (FY2020–H1 FY2025)

- https://xtech.nikkei.com/atcl/nxt/news/24/02444/ (FY3/2025 OP +12% / margin 17.6%, verification source)
- https://it-biz.jp/news-and-topics/5722.html (V2030 vision: ¥1T revenue / 20% OP margin target by FY3/2030)
